issues.title: Loan Simple leads receiving double tasks across multiple workflows
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were generating duplicate tasks in the pre-referral, post-referral, and sale pending workflows. The root cause was a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations, which HubSpot confirmed and resolved. TCs and HAs were receiving redundant task notifications for the same leads.
issues.workaround: Review task history for any LS leads active during the impact window and manually close or dismiss duplicate tasks to avoid double follow-up.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks not stopping when deal marked Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: Deals marked as Closed Lost or Transferred were continuing to generate post-referral workflow check-in tasks instead of unenrolling. HAs reported receiving weekly check-in tasks for deals already marked lost or transferred. A filter tweak was applied to resolve the suppression logic.
issues.workaround: Manually dismiss any lingering check-in tasks on deals that were marked Closed Lost or Transferred during the impact window.

issues.title: LO update not reflected in automated agent emails after loan officer change
issues.desc: When a loan officer was changed on a deal, automated emails to the agent continued to display the previous LO's information instead of the updated one. The affected deal showed Julie Yocum should have been listed but Paul's details were still going out. The issue was resolved by Luis on the product side.
issues.workaround: For deals where the LO was changed during the impact window, manually send a corrected introduction email to the agent with the accurate LO details.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow not re-triggering after deal stage flip back and forth
issues.desc: When a deal was set to Offer Accepted, then reverted to a prior stage, then set back to Offer Accepted, the TC workflow and associated tasks did not re-trigger. The root cause was that 'deal stage = offer accepted' was not included as a re-enrollment criterion. The workflow was updated to add re-enrollment on that trigger.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any deals that cycled through Offer Accepted more than once during the impact window to ensure TCs received the correct closing tasks.

issues.title: MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted not enrolling TCs into workflow
issues.desc: MRC deals marked as Offer Accepted were not triggering the TC workflow, meaning TCs were not receiving tasks to collect closing information. HAs had to manually send closing info requests. HubSpot support was engaged and confirmed a fix was applied.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any MRC deals that were moved to Offer Accepted between approximately March 14 and April 1 and verify TCs received their closing task checklist.
